tender.description: Production of 5000 Tonnes of IGS in 26 beds by Scrapping, collection and heaping of salt in L row crystallizers area from 01.06.2026 to 31.12.2026 at Mariyur Valinokkam salt complex, Valinokkam, Ramanathapuram Dist.
